description_long: This is a futuristic, military-style airplane with a sleek, angular fuselage and a dark, matte finish. The aircraft features a forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a tinted canopy, and is equipped with prominent weaponry on both sides of the nose. Its wings are mid-mounted and swept back, each supporting large, cylindrical jet engines with visible intakes and exhausts. The tail section is distinctive, featuring an H-tail configuration with twin vertical stabilizers and horizontal stabilizers extending outward. The overall design suggests a high-performance, combat-oriented vehicle with advanced aerodynamics and heavy armament.
description: A dark, angular military airplane with swept mid-wings, large jet engines, and an H-tail, featuring a forward cockpit and visible weaponry.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed nose, forward cockpit canopy, and symmetrical weapon mounts on either side.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the swept mid-wings, large cylindrical engines, and detailed weaponry under the nose.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the H-tail configuration, twin vertical stabilizers, and engine exhausts.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with clear visibility of the engines, swept wings, and nose-mounted weapons.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing, swept wings with slight anhedral angle and no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted on pylons above and behind the wings.
attribute_tail_design: H-tail configuration with twin vertical stabilizers and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear, with visible main and nose gear bays.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single canopy, likely single or tandem seat.
